projectDescription: A context-aware workspace manager for Linux and Termux that lets you define named flows to automatically launch editors, open URLs, and save session context notes.
keyFeatures: Named workspace flows with editor, URLs, and environment setup
One-command flow activation: launches editor and opens all URLs simultaneously
Context note saving on flow deactivation to resume work later
PID-based process tracking via lockfiles for clean teardown
Cross-platform support: Linux (xdg-open) and Android Termux (termux-open-url)
Interactive and non-interactive flow creation modes
Custom shell and environment variable support per flow
publicApiSurface: FlowConfig { name, directory, editorCmd, urlList, shell, env, note }
